title: Fix a LiveView that duplicates state between parent and child LC
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/kanban_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.KanbanLive) that owns a single source of truth for @columns state. It renders <.live_component module={MyAppWeb.ColumnComponent} id={"col-#{col.id}"} column={col} /> but the ColumnComponent MUST NOT maintain its own duplicate copy of the column state — it reads from assigns only. Events in the component must use send(self(), ...) to notify the parent, and the parent updates the canonical state. The parent LiveView owns @columns; the component is mostly stateless but has an `id`.
tier_rationale: Requires decision about where state lives. Multi-piece design.
